bioweapons.name: Tyrant T-002
bioweapons.description: Prototype Tyrant with exceptional strength and regenerative capability.

bioweapons.name: Yawn
bioweapons.description: Gigantic snake mutated by prolonged viral exposure.

bioweapons.name: Plant 42
bioweapons.description: Plant-based organism with rapid growth and tentacle-like appendages.

bioweapons.name: Cerberus
bioweapons.description: Doberman-based B.O.W. engineered for high-speed pursuit and coordinated pack attacks.

bioweapons.name: Giant Spider
bioweapons.description: Oversized arachnid mutated through prolonged viral exposure, capable of venomous attacks and egg spawning.

bioweapons.name: G (Stage 1–5)
bioweapons.description: Rapidly mutating organism driven by reproductive instinct.

bioweapons.name: Mr. X (T-103)
bioweapons.description: Mass-produced Tyrant deployed for target elimination.

bioweapons.name: Licker
bioweapons.description: Skinless quadruped with heightened senses and lethal claws.

bioweapons.name: Nemesis-T Type
bioweapons.description: Advanced Tyrant capable of independent thought and weapon use.

bioweapons.name: Grave Digger
bioweapons.description: Massive subterranean creature mutated by viral contamination.

bioweapons.name: Nosferatu
bioweapons.description: Heavily mutated human with elongated limbs and toxic breath.

bioweapons.name: Bandersnatch
bioweapons.description: Mass-produced B.O.W. with elastic limbs and unstable physiology.
